creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I dont understand what this means. If you have a problem write it up in 
english. In addition the thing I understand is that it might be about 
mplayer, which is a port, you could consider asking ports@FreeBSD.org 
before posting a PR. If you do need to file a PR, please write as much 
information as possible (which isn't the case in the current one). 
Thanks for using FreeBSD!
